title: Quality of Life
description: A modpack which adds quality of life features and optimizes the game.
body:
# Quality of Life
My first ever modpack which not only optimizes the game a bit, but it also adds some features I find very usefull and should be in the vanilla game.

This modpack adds features most people would like to see in the base game such as backpacks, bigger storage, voice chat and recipe viewing for items you need to unlock without needing to get the base materials to then get the achievement for it. This pack also adds some other neat features such as dynamic light effects.

Here is the full list of features currently in the pack
## Features
- 3D Skin Layers
- Ambient Sounds
- Voice Chat
- Connected Textures
- Better Statistics Screen
- Optimizations
- BackPacks
- New Fly system
- Essentials Mod
- Zoom
- Easy Shulker Boxes
- Easy Magic
- Easy Anvils
- Recipe viewing
- Schematics
- Tweakeroo
- Mouse Tweaks
- Minimap and Worldmap
- Storage Drawers
- Trade Cycling
- Sound Physics
- Keybind searching
